instruction.en: Five tiles will be created, one for each channel of the device. Switch the unit on and off five times and hold for 5 seconds to enter pairing mode (the LED should flash red and blue).

_pidConflictNotes: // PID-CONFLICT-NOTE TS0726 shared with 21 other drivers (cross-class; mfrs distinct (false positive)). Sacred Couple rule applies: mfr+PID pair disambiguates. See: docs/P2_PID_CONFLICT_RESOLUTION_2026-07-12.md
